mapper.select: SELECT d.id, d.source_bill_no, d.source_bill_type, m.name AS product_code, d.old_supplier, os.name AS spec_model, ns.name AS new_supplier, d.change_reason, d.old_package_req, d.old_gross_weight, d.old_net_weight, d.old_length, d.old_width, d.old_height, d.old_box_qty, d.new_package_req, d.new_gross_weight, d.new_net_weight, d.new_length, d.new_width, d.new_height, d.new_box_qty FROM sale_change_detail d LEFT JOIN by_material m ON d.product_code = m.k3_id LEFT JOIN supplier os ON d.old_supplier = os.supplierid LEFT JOIN supplier ns ON d.new_supplier = ns.supplierid WHERE d.source_bill_no = #{sourceBillNo};
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sale_change_detail ( source_bill_no, source_bill_type, product_code, product_name, spec_model, old_supplier, new_supplier, change_reason, old_package_req, old_gross_weight, old_net_weight, old_length, old_width, old_height, old_box_qty, new_package_req, new_gross_weight, new_net_weight, new_length, new_width, new_height, new_box_qty ) VALUES
( #{item.sourceBillNo}, #{item.sourceBillType}, #{item.productCode}, #{item.productName}, #{item.specModel}, #{item.oldSupplier}, #{item.newSupplier}, #{item.changeReason}, #{item.oldPackageReq}, #{item.oldGrossWeight}, #{item.oldNetWeight}, #{item.oldLength}, #{item.oldWidth}, #{item.oldHeight}, #{item.oldBoxQty}, #{item.newPackageReq}, #{item.newGrossWeight}, #{item.newNetWeight}, #{item.newLength}, #{item.newWidth}, #{item.newHeight}, #{item.newBoxQty} )
